requirement_topic.en: Mandatory energy-efficiency labelling for refrigerators (RTE INEN energy regulation, NTE INEN test method, MEER oversight)
requirement_topic.zh: 电冰箱强制性能效标识（RTE INEN能效法规、NTE INEN试验方法、MEER监管）
requirement_topic.zht: 電冰箱強制性能效標識（RTE INEN能效法規、NTE INEN試驗方法、MEER監管）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in Ecuador must carry a mandatory energy-efficiency label under the applicable RTE INEN energy regulation, with energy-efficiency classes and consumption determined by the corresponding NTE INEN test-method standard (the Ecuadorian adoption of the ISO/IEC 62552 / IEC 62552 measurement series for refrigerating appliances). The energy-efficiency scheme is overseen by the energy ministry — historically the Ministerio de Electricidad y Energia Renovable (MEER), now consolidated under the Ministerio de Energia y Minas (and its renewable-energy/efficiency functions) — in coordination with INEN. The label shows the efficiency class and annual energy consumption (kWh/year) and must be in Spanish. Demonstration of the declared class is part of the Certificate of Conformity to the RTE; non-compliant or unlabelled units cannot be nationalized.
summary.zh: 在厄瓜多尔销售的家用电冰箱须依据适用的RTE INEN能效法规附贴强制性能效标签，其能效等级及耗电量依据相应的NTE INEN试验方法标准（厄瓜多尔采用的制冷器具ISO/IEC 62552/IEC 62552测量系列）确定。能效方案由能源主管部门监管——历史上为电力与可再生能源部（MEER），现整合于能源与矿业部（及其可再生能源/能效职能）——并与INEN协调。标签显示能效等级及年耗电量（千瓦时/年），须为西班牙文。所声明等级的证明是RTE合格证书的一部分；不合规或无标签产品无法清关入境。
summary.zht: 在厄瓜多爾銷售的家用電冰箱須依據適用的RTE INEN能效法規附貼強制性能效標籤，其能效等級及耗電量依據相應的NTE INEN試驗方法標準（厄瓜多爾採用的製冷器具ISO/IEC 62552/IEC 62552測量系列）確定。能效方案由能源主管部門監管——歷史上為電力與可再生能源部（MEER），現整合於能源與礦業部（及其可再生能源/能效職能）——並與INEN協調。標籤顯示能效等級及年耗電量（千瓦時/年），須為西班牙文。所聲明等級的證明是RTE合格證書的一部分；不合規或無標籤產品無法清關入境。

standards_or_laws: RTE INEN (energy-efficiency technical regulation for household refrigerating appliances) — mandatory energy label
NTE INEN adopting ISO/IEC 62552 / IEC 62552 series — measurement of energy consumption and characteristics of refrigerating appliances
Ministerio de Energia / MEER (Ministerio de Electricidad y Energia Renovable) — energy-efficiency labelling oversight in coordination with INEN

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2 (minimum allowable energy-efficiency values and energy-efficiency grades), with grades 1 (most efficient) to 5 (minimum threshold) and annual consumption limits, enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label (CEL) system administered with NDRC/CNIS. Measurement follows the GB/T standard aligned with the IEC 62552 series. The China Energy Label must be displayed before domestic sale. While both China and Ecuador ultimately measure consumption using IEC 62552-derived methods, the class scales (China 1-5 grade vs Ecuador's RTE INEN class structure) and threshold values differ, so a Chinese grade does not map directly to an Ecuadorian class.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2（能效限定值及能效等级），分1级（最高效）至5级（最低门槛）并设年耗电量限值，由市场监管总局依据中国能效标识（CEL）制度执行，与NDRC/CNIS共同管理。测量依据与IEC 62552系列对齐的GB/T标准。中国能效标识须在国内销售前展示。虽然中国与厄瓜多尔最终均采用源自IEC 62552的方法测量耗电量，但等级体系（中国1-5级 vs 厄瓜多尔RTE INEN等级结构）及门槛值不同，故中国等级不能直接映射至厄瓜多尔等级。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2（能效限定值及能效等級），分1級（最高效）至5級（最低門檻）並設年耗電量限值，由市場監管總局依據中國能效標識（CEL）制度執行，與NDRC/CNIS共同管理。測量依據與IEC 62552系列對齊的GB/T標準。中國能效標識須在國內銷售前展示。雖然中國與厄瓜多爾最終均採用源自IEC 62552的方法測量耗電量，但等級體系（中國1-5級 vs 厄瓜多爾RTE INEN等級結構）及門檻值不同，故中國等級不能直接映射至厄瓜多爾等級。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; SAMR/NDRC China Energy Label)
GB/T standard aligned with IEC 62552 series — measurement of energy consumption of refrigerating appliances

gap.en: Three gaps. (1) Different class scale and thresholds: a Chinese GB 12021.2 grade (1-5) does not equal an Ecuadorian RTE INEN energy class — the declared class for the Ecuador label must be derived against the Ecuadorian regulation's class boundaries, even though both rest on IEC 62552 measurement. (2) Re-presentation of the label: the Chinese China Energy Label cannot be used; a Spanish-language Ecuadorian energy label showing class and kWh/year is required and is checked at certification/customs. (3) Test conditions: the IEC 62552 measurement should be referenced to the conditions and any climate-class assumptions used by the Ecuadorian regulation; existing GB/T-based test data may be acceptable to the certifier if traceable to IEC 62552, but this must be confirmed with the recognized body. Energy non-compliance or a missing/incorrect class blocks nationalization at Guayaquil just as a safety failure would.
gap.zh: 三个差距。（1）等级体系与门槛不同：中国GB 12021.2等级（1-5）不等于厄瓜多尔RTE INEN能效等级——用于厄瓜多尔标签的所声明等级须依据厄瓜多尔法规的等级边界推导，尽管两者均基于IEC 62552测量。（2）标签重新呈现：不能使用中国能效标识；须使用显示等级及千瓦时/年的西班牙文厄瓜多尔能效标签，并在认证/海关核查。（3）试验条件：IEC 62552测量应参照厄瓜多尔法规所用条件及任何气候等级假设；现有基于GB/T的测试数据若可追溯至IEC 62552，认证方或可接受，但须与认可机构确认。能效不合规或等级缺失/错误，与安全不合格一样会在瓜亚基尔阻碍清关入境。
gap.zht: 三個差距。（1）等級體系與門檻不同：中國GB 12021.2等級（1-5）不等於厄瓜多爾RTE INEN能效等級——用於厄瓜多爾標籤的所聲明等級須依據厄瓜多爾法規的等級邊界推導，儘管兩者均基於IEC 62552測量。（2）標籤重新呈現：不能使用中國能效標識；須使用顯示等級及千瓦時/年的西班牙文厄瓜多爾能效標籤，並在認證/海關核查。（3）試驗條件：IEC 62552測量應參照厄瓜多爾法規所用條件及任何氣候等級假設；現有基於GB/T的測試數據若可追溯至IEC 62552，認證方或可接受，但須與認可機構確認。能效不合規或等級缺失/錯誤，與安全不合格一樣會在瓜亞基爾阻礙清關入境。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — energy-efficiency label under the RTE INEN energy regulation (NTE INEN/IEC 62552 method, MEER/Ministerio de Energia oversight) required; declared class verified within the Certificate of Conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before domestic sale; SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An Ecuadorian energy-efficiency label (RTE INEN energy regulation, IEC 62552-based NTE INEN method, MEER/Ministerio de Energia oversight) is mandatory and is verified within the Certificate of Conformity. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades and the China Energy Label do not transfer; the declared class must be recalculated to the Ecuadorian scale and shown on a Spanish label.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔能效标签（RTE INEN能效法规、基于IEC 62552的NTE INEN方法、MEER/能源部监管）为强制性，并在合格证书内核查。中国GB 12021.2等级及中国能效标识不可移植；所声明等级须重新换算至厄瓜多尔体系并标示于西班牙文标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多爾能效標籤（RTE INEN能效法規、基於IEC 62552的NTE INEN方法、MEER/能源部監管）為強制性，並在合格證書內核查。中國GB 12021.2等級及中國能效標識不可移植；所聲明等級須重新換算至厄瓜多爾體系並標示於西班牙文標籤。

requirement_topic.en: Minimum energy-performance / efficiency thresholds and absence of an EPREL-style central pre-registration database
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效性能门槛及无类似EPREL的中央预注册数据库
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效性能門檻及無類似EPREL的中央預登記數據庫

summary.en: Beyond carrying the label, refrigerators must meet the minimum energy-performance thresholds set in the applicable RTE INEN energy regulation — i.e. a unit below the regulation's minimum efficiency class cannot lawfully be placed on the market. Demonstration is through the test report (NTE INEN/IEC 62552) and the Certificate of Conformity; the importer retains the technical documentation. Unlike the EU, Ecuador does not operate a central public product-registration database equivalent to EPREL into which each model must be entered before market placement; conformity is evidenced by the certificate and held by the importer/certifier rather than uploaded to a consumer-facing registry. Exporters should confirm the current minimum class threshold in force, as efficiency floors are periodically tightened by INEN/MEER.
summary.zh: 除附贴标签外，电冰箱须满足适用RTE INEN能效法规规定的最低能效性能门槛——即低于该法规最低能效等级的产品不得合法投放市场。证明通过测试报告（NTE INEN/IEC 62552）及合格证书；进口商保存技术文件。与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔不设等同于EPREL的中央公开产品注册数据库要求每款产品在投放前录入；符合性以证书为证，由进口商/认证方保存，而非上传至面向消费者的注册库。出口商应确认现行最低等级门槛，因为能效下限由INEN/MEER定期收紧。
summary.zht: 除附貼標籤外，電冰箱須滿足適用RTE INEN能效法規規定的最低能效性能門檻——即低於該法規最低能效等級的產品不得合法投放市場。證明通過測試報告（NTE INEN/IEC 62552）及合格證書；進口商保存技術文件。與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾不設等同於EPREL的中央公開產品登記數據庫要求每款產品在投放前錄入；符合性以證書為證，由進口商/認證方保存，而非上傳至面向消費者的登記庫。出口商應確認現行最低等級門檻，因為能效下限由INEN/MEER定期收緊。

standards_or_laws: RTE INEN energy regulation — minimum energy-efficiency class threshold for placing household refrigerators on the Ecuadorian market
NTE INEN / IEC 62552 series — test method to demonstrate the declared class and consumption
No EPREL-equivalent central pre-registration database in Ecuador (conformity evidenced by certificate held by importer/certifier)

summary.en: China's GB 12021.2 sets minimum allowable energy-efficiency values: a refrigerator that does not meet the Grade 5 (minimum) threshold cannot be lawfully sold. The China Energy Label is filed with CNIS and there is a national energy-label record/filing system, but it is a Chinese domestic registration, not an Ecuadorian one, and confers no recognition abroad. China likewise does not require entry into any Ecuadorian or EU registry; for export to Ecuador the Chinese filing is irrelevant and the Ecuadorian certificate-based route applies.
summary.zh: 中国GB 12021.2设定能效限定值：未达5级（最低）门槛的冰箱不得合法销售。中国能效标识在CNIS备案，存在国家能效标识备案系统，但属中国国内注册，非厄瓜多尔注册，在境外无认可。中国同样不要求录入任何厄瓜多尔或欧盟注册库；对厄瓜多尔出口而言中国备案不相关，适用厄瓜多尔以证书为基础的途径。
summary.zht: 中國GB 12021.2設定能效限定值：未達5級（最低）門檻的冰箱不得合法銷售。中國能效標識在CNIS備案，存在國家能效標識備案系統，但屬中國國內註冊，非厄瓜多爾註冊，在境外無認可。中國同樣不要求錄入任何厄瓜多爾或歐盟註冊庫；對厄瓜多爾出口而言中國備案不相關，適用厄瓜多爾以證書為基礎的途徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — minimum allowable energy-efficiency values (Grade 5 floor) for household refrigerators in China
China Energy Label filing with CNIS — domestic record only (no foreign recognition)

gap.en: Two practical differences. (1) Threshold compliance, not just labelling: meeting the Chinese Grade 5 floor does not guarantee meeting Ecuador's minimum class threshold — the unit's measured consumption must satisfy the Ecuadorian RTE INEN minimum class, and that floor is periodically raised by INEN/MEER, so the current threshold must be confirmed for each shipment cycle. (2) No EPREL-style pre-registration: unlike the EU, Ecuador has no central public model-by-model registry to populate, which removes the EPREL data-upload burden but means the burden shifts to the per-certificate technical file held by the importer/certifier and re-verified at certification. Exporters should not assume the absence of an EPREL-style registry means lighter scrutiny; the Certificate of Conformity still requires complete, traceable IEC 62552 test evidence for the declared class.
gap.zh: 两个实务差异。（1）门槛合规而非仅标识：达到中国5级下限不保证满足厄瓜多尔最低等级门槛——产品实测耗电量须满足厄瓜多尔RTE INEN最低等级，且该下限由INEN/MEER定期提高，故每个出货周期须确认现行门槛。（2）无EPREL式预注册：与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔无须逐款填报的中央公开注册库，免除了EPREL数据上传负担，但负担转移至进口商/认证方保存、并在认证时重新核验的逐证技术文件。出口商不应假定无EPREL式注册库即审查更宽松；合格证书仍要求完整、可追溯的IEC 62552测试证据以支持所声明等级。
gap.zht: 兩個實務差異。（1）門檻合規而非僅標識：達到中國5級下限不保證滿足厄瓜多爾最低等級門檻——產品實測耗電量須滿足厄瓜多爾RTE INEN最低等級，且該下限由INEN/MEER定期提高，故每個出貨週期須確認現行門檻。（2）無EPREL式預登記：與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾無須逐款填報的中央公開登記庫，免除了EPREL數據上傳負擔，但負擔轉移至進口商/認證方保存、並在認證時重新核驗的逐證技術文件。出口商不應假定無EPREL式登記庫即審查更寬鬆；合格證書仍要求完整、可追溯的IEC 62552測試證據以支持所聲明等級。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — minimum energy-efficiency class threshold under the RTE INEN energy regulation required for market placement; no EPREL-equivalent pre-registration database exists (certificate-based evidence instead)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 minimum (Grade 5) threshold required for domestic sale; China Energy Label filed with CNIS (domestic only)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A refrigerator must meet the minimum energy-efficiency class in the applicable RTE INEN energy regulation to be placed on the Ecuadorian market; the Chinese Grade 5 floor does not guarantee this. Ecuador has no EPREL-style central pre-registration database — conformity is evidenced by the certificate and IEC 62552 test file held by the importer/certifier, not lighter scrutiny.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电冰箱须满足适用RTE INEN能效法规的最低能效等级方可投放厄瓜多尔市场；中国5级下限不保证满足。厄瓜多尔无EPREL式中央预注册数据库——符合性以进口商/认证方保存的证书及IEC 62552测试文件为证，而非审查更宽松。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電冰箱須滿足適用RTE INEN能效法規的最低能效等級方可投放厄瓜多爾市場；中國5級下限不保證滿足。厄瓜多爾無EPREL式中央預登記數據庫——符合性以進口商/認證方保存的證書及IEC 62552測試文件為證，而非審查更寬鬆。
